subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Pour forth upon the people of the Bayán the Kawthar of divine exposition. Glorified be the All-Merciful Who hath spoken in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی فاسق ملا البیان کوثر التبیان تعالی الرحمن الذی نطق بالحق
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
